marketplace.name: Scott Weiss Skills Marketplace
marketplace.description: A public, author-curated collection of portable skills for AI coding harnesses
marketplace.summary: Machine-discoverable engineering skills with explicit contracts, examples, and validation.
marketplace.author: Scott Weiss

skills.name: Disciplined Implementation
skills.summary: Strict test-first implementation loop with full-gate verification, real-artifact checks, independent review, and auditable reporting.
skills.description: An intentionally strict, portable engineering method for substantial coding tasks. It requires orientation, grounded planning, RED→GREEN, complete verification before every commit, real-artifact checks, independent review, and exact evidence; waivers are limited to impossible or inapplicable steps.

codex.integration: paste as instruction or reference document

claude.integration: include in system prompt or custom instructions
